Trigger/Action: TRIGGER: Purchase completed OR Milestone reached OR High NPS score OR Positive support interaction
Tool/System: Order management / CRM milestone tracking / NPS survey / Support ticket system

Trigger/Action: Determine optimal timing for request based on customer journey stage and product type
Tool/System: Customer journey analytics / Timing optimization algorithm

Trigger/Action: Send personalized review request via preferred channel (email, SMS) with easy submission link
Tool/System: Email/SMS platform / Review request automation (Yotpo, Trustpilot, Birdeye)

Trigger/Action: For referrals: Provide unique referral link/code with clear incentive explanation
Tool/System: Referral software (GrowSurf, ReferralCandy, Viral Loops) / Unique link generator

Trigger/Action: Track review submissions across platforms (Google, Yelp, Facebook, G2, Capterra, Trustpilot)
Tool/System: Review monitoring platform (ReviewTrackers, Podium) / Multi-platform aggregator
Data_Fields: review_id, platform, rating, review_text, reviewer_name, review_date

Trigger/Action: Monitor referral link shares and track clicks, signups, conversions from referrals
Tool/System: Referral tracking software / Attribution system / Conversion pixel

Trigger/Action: DECISION: Positive review (4-5 stars) or successful referral conversion detected?
Tool/System: Review sentiment detection / Referral conversion webhook

Trigger/Action: IF YES: Send thank you message + deliver reward/incentive + request testimonial permission
Tool/System: Automated thank you campaign / Reward delivery system / Testimonial request

Trigger/Action: IF YES: Alert support team immediately + send empathetic response + offer resolution
Tool/System: Support ticket creation / Response template automation / Escalation workflow

Trigger/Action: Auto-publish approved positive reviews to website testimonials page and marketing materials
Tool/System: Website CMS integration / Testimonial widget / Marketing automation

Trigger/Action: Credit referral rewards automatically when conversion criteria met (purchase, subscription)
Tool/System: Reward fulfillment system (gift cards, discounts, credits) / Payment processor

Trigger/Action: Generate social proof content from reviews for ads, landing pages, and social media
Tool/System: Social proof aggregator / Content automation / UGC management

Trigger/Action: Create leaderboard for top referrers and send engagement campaigns to active advocates
Tool/System: Gamification platform / Leaderboard widget / Advocate engagement campaigns
